sizing_rule.note: Withdraw 2.20672315% of active equity each quarter and transfer to inactive buffer account. This is a systematic capital reduction/reallocation rule, not a per-trade position sizing rule. Withdrawal continues periodically until active equity reaches zero.

source_rule_text: Withdraw a fixed percentage of active equity each period (quarterly) and transfer to inactive buffer account, with the withdrawal rate calculated to eventually deplete active equity to zero over a specified number of periods.
